pillars.title: Open Markets
pillars.summary: Permissionless order books with on-protocol settlement, audit trails, and transparent fee policies.

pillars.title: Transparent Treasury
pillars.summary: All inflows, outflows, and balances published on-protocol and subject to Civic Assembly approval.

pillars.title: Bounty Networks
pillars.summary: Automated bounty posting, milestone verification, and escrow release with verifiable acceptance criteria.

pillars.title: Quadratic Funding
pillars.summary: Public goods funded by quadratic matching to amplify underfunded, widely-valued projects.

pillars.title: Merit Governance
pillars.summary: Governance and disbursement weights derived from contribution and verifiable participation, not stake size.

programs.title: Open Market Protocol
programs.summary: Permissionless order-book infrastructure with on-protocol matching and settlement guarantees for verified citizens.

programs.title: Bounty Dispatch Bureau
programs.summary: Automated bounty posting, milestone verification, and escrow release for civic and commercial deliverables.

programs.title: Public Goods Quadratic Match
programs.summary: Quadratic matching fund for public goods amplified by protocol to support high-value, low-income projects.

programs.title: Merit Weighting Review
programs.summary: Periodic calibration of contribution-weight algorithms to preserve sybil resistance and prevent gaming.

programs.title: Citizen Commerce Enablement
programs.summary: Onboarding curriculum, instrument workshops, and dispute-resolution playbooks for new market participants.

programs.title: Cross-Border Trade Pilot
programs.summary: Interoperability pilot with recognized external partners to exchange verifiable credentials and instruments.

programs.title: Currency Stability Oversight
programs.summary: Reserve-backed liquidity monitoring, volatility guards, and redemption pathways for citizen-held stable instruments.

instruments.title: Aether Credit
instruments.summary: Protocol-backed liquidity with deterministic settlement, reserve attestation, and merchant acceptance.

instruments.title: Participation Certificate
instruments.summary: Merit-weighted certificate reflecting documented contribution, civic participation, and verifiable skill attestations.

instruments.title: Grant Note
instruments.summary: Time-limited instrument minted against approved public-good grants with milestone-linked release.

instruments.title: Bounty Bond
instruments.summary: Instant-issue bond enabling upfront funding for multi-milestone deliverables for high-trust citizens.

instruments.title: Merit Stablecoin
instruments.summary: Governance-tethered stable unit with bandwidth adjustment tied to throughput and reserve coverage ratio.

reports.title: Q1 Market Integrity Review
reports.summary: Order-book fairness, fee transparency, and settlement latency review across open-market runtimes.

reports.title: Midyear Treasury Reconciliation
reports.summary: Line-item reconciliation of ministry budgets, instrument flows, and public-goods disbursements through Q2.

reports.title: Citizen Participation Survey
reports.summary: Annual survey of citizen engagement, satisfaction, and trust across economy ministries and programs.

reports.title: Instruments Depth & Distribution Review
reports.summary: Analysis of instrument distribution, concentration, and reserve coverage across Aetheria markets.

reports.title: Quadratic Funding Efficacy Report
reports.summary: Capital efficiency, project diversity, and long-term outcomes metrics for quadratic matching pools.
